name: Milady

skills.name: Mechanical Minions
skills.description: Summons minions upon killing a unit. Minions attack automatically, then merge into an advanced bot or explode at the end of their duration, dealing damage to nearby enemies.

skills.name: Air Superiority
skills.description: Commands her aircraft to move in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies in its path. Using the skill again splits the aircraft in two, dealing damage and inflicting slow.

skills.name: Forced Invasion
skills.description: Summons mechanical minions in the target area, dealing area damage before automatically attacking nearby enemies.

skills.name: Chaos Field
skills.description: Marks a target enemy or structure, damaging them over time. Non-structures are also stunned and slowed. Nearby mechanical minions are enhanced while marks are active. Marks explode upon expiry, dealing damage proportional to the damage taken while marked.

tips: Milady is a Medium Mage (Mid Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S+ with 49.0% win rate and 1.9% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Boots of Tranquility → Mask of Agony → Void Staff → Twilight Stream → Venomous Staff.
Run Nightmare for stats that match Milady's Mage kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Air Superiority → Forced Invasion → Chaos Field → reposition. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for maximum damage and passive value.
Laning: Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.
Teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
Milady excels into Nakoruru, Pei, Mai Shiranui. Avoid blind picking into Allain, Fuzi, Haya without team peel.

Milady is a Tier S+ staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Ban rate 2.4% — expect Milady to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.

faqs.question: Is Milady good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Milady is Tier S+ Mage with 49.0% win rate, 1.9% pick rate, and 2.4% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Strong meta pick for ranked.

faqs.question: What is the best Milady build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Boots of Tranquility, Mask of Agony, Void Staff, Twilight Stream, ardent dominator, Venomous Staff. Run Nightmare arcana with Flash. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Milady?
faqs.answer: Pick Allain, Fuzi, Haya into Milady. Deny Mid Lane resources early and force fights before Milady completes core items. Milady struggles when the enemy can out-range or out-sustain them.

faqs.question: Who does Milady counter?
faqs.answer: Milady is strong into Nakoruru, Pei, Mai Shiranui according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Milady when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Mid Lane lane.

faqs.question: Is Milady good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Milady is a Tier S+ staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Ban rate 2.4% — expect Milady to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.

faqs.question: What lane should Milady play?
faqs.answer: Milady is tagged Mid Lane in Camp export (Mage). Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Milady?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Nightmare arcana. Battle spell: Flash. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Milady or Daji — which is better?
faqs.answer: Milady vs Daji (Mage, Tier S+): Daji is 2.4% pick / 51.0% WR. Daji wins 2.1% more often globally. Choose Milady when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Daji for Mid Lane comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Milady?
faqs.answer: Yes in tryhard queues — 2.4% ban rate. Deny if enemy first-picks Mage.
